scripts.build: vite build && npx shx cp public/CNAME dist/CNAME
scripts.build:staging: vite build --mode staging && npx shx cp public/CNAME dist/CNAME
scripts.apk:staging-debug: npm run build:staging && npx cap sync android && cd android && .\gradlew.bat assembleStagingDebug
scripts.apk:prod-debug: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && .\gradlew.bat assembleProductionDebug
scripts.apk:staging-release: npm run build:staging && npx cap sync android && cd android && .\gradlew.bat assembleStagingRelease
scripts.apk:prod-release: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && .\gradlew.bat assembleProductionRelease
